message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "User" as User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as Executor
participant "Analysis" as Analysis
participant "CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CountryCaseAPIGetter
participant "CountryDeathAPIGetter" as CountryDeathAPIGetter
participant "CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as CountryPopulationAPIGetter
participant "APIInformationGetter" as APIInformationGetter
actor "Covid API" as CovidAPI

User -> Executor : runAnalysis()

opt [At least one country selected for analysis]
  Executor -> Analysis : analyze()
  
  alt [CasesPerCapitaAnalysis]
    par
      Executor -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getCases()
      activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
      CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
      CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
      CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      CountryCaseAPIGetter -> Executor : Cases in target Countries
      deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
      
      Executor -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getPopulation()
      activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
      CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
      CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
      CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
      activate CovidAPI
      CovidAPI -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
      deactivate CovidAPI
      CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> Executor : Population of target Countries
      deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
    end
  end
  
  [TotalCaseAnalysis]
  Executor -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getCases()
  activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
  CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
  CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
  CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
  activate CovidAPI
  CovidAPI -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
  deactivate CovidAPI
  CountryCaseAPIGetter -> Executor : Cases in target Countries
  deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
  
  [MajorityCasesPerCapitaAnalysis]
  par
    Executor -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getMaleCases()
    activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
    CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
    CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
    CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
    activate CovidAPI
    CovidAPI -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
    deactivate CovidAPI
    CountryCaseAPIGetter -> Executor : Male cases in target Countries
    deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
    
    Executor -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getFemaleCases()
    activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
    note right of CountryCaseAPIGetter
      A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
    end
    CountryCaseAPIGetter -> Executor : Female cases in target Countries
    deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
    
    Executor -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getMalePopulation()
    activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
    activate CovidAPI
    CovidAPI -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
    deactivate CovidAPI
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> Executor : Male population in target Countries
    deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
    
    Executor -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getFemalePopulation()
    activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
    note right of CountryPopulationAPIGetter
      A call to the endpoint has already been made so another is not necessary
    end
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> Executor : Female population in target Countries
    deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
  end
  
  [DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis]
  par
    Executor -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : getDeaths()
    activate CountryDeathAPIGetter
    CountryDeathAPIGetter -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : getDataURL()
    CountryDeathAPIGetter -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
    CountryDeathAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
    activate CovidAPI
    CovidAPI -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : API Information
    deactivate CovidAPI
    CountryDeathAPIGetter -> Executor : Deaths in target Countries
    deactivate CountryDeathAPIGetter
    
    Executor -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getPopulation()
    activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
    activate CovidAPI
    CovidAPI -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
    deactivate CovidAPI
    CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> Executor : Population of target Countries
    deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
  end
end

Executor -> Executor : Analysis Result

note right of Executor
  Per country analysis results are stored for later rendering
endnote

Executor -> User : Finish (void)

@enduml
